memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, int terrainId, int x, int y, int z, MatterState matterState)
memberdef.name: setEmptyWaterComponentsStorage

briefdescription.para: Sets the components for a coordinate in the TerrainGridRepository to represent an empty water tile.

parameterdescription.para: The entt::registry (used for context, not modified).
The VoxelGrid for accessing the terrain repository.

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, int x, int y, int z, int vaporAmount)
memberdef.name: createVaporTerrainEntity

briefdescription.para: Creates a new entity and initializes it as a vapor terrain block.

detaileddescription.para:
Creates an entity in the ECS and sets its corresponding properties (Position, Type, Matter, etc.) directly in the TerrainGridRepository.
registry
The entt::registry to create the entity in.
voxelGrid
The VoxelGrid for accessing the terrain repository.
x
The x-coordinate for the new entity.
y
The y-coordinate for the new entity.
z
The z-coordinate for the new entity.
vaporAmount
The amount of vapor to initialize the entity with.
The newly created vapor entity.

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, entt::dispatcher &dispatcher, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, entt::entity entity, const aetherion::InvalidEntityException &e)
memberdef.name: cleanupInvalidTerrainEntity

briefdescription.para: Destroys an entity and cleans up its associated data from the TerrainGridRepository.

parameterdescription.para: The VoxelGrid for accessing the terrain repository.
The exception that triggered the cleanup.

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::dispatcher &dispatcher, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, entt::entity entity, bool takeLock)
memberdef.name: softDeactivateTerrainEntity

briefdescription.para: Wrapper around TerrainGridRepository::softDeactivateEntity to centralize state changes in this module.

parameterdescription.para: Whether the repository should take its internal lock.

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, entt::dispatcher &dispatcher, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, entt::entity entity, bool shouldLock=true)
memberdef.name: _destroyEntity

briefdescription.para: Destroys an entity in the registry.

memberdef.argsstring: (VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, int x, int y, int z)
memberdef.name: _ensureEntityActive

briefdescription.para: Ensures that a terrain entity is active in the ECS.

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, entt::dispatcher &dispatcher, entt::entity &terrain)
memberdef.name: deleteEntityOrConvertInEmpty

briefdescription.para: Dispatches an event to kill an entity or converts it to soft empty.

detaileddescription.para:
If the entity has no active tile effects, it enqueues a KillEntityEvent. Otherwise, it converts the entity into a "soft empty" terrain block to allow effects to resolve.
registry
The entt::registry.
dispatcher
The entt::dispatcher to enqueue events.
terrain
The entity to delete or convert.

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, entt::dispatcher &dispatcher, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, const Position &pos, entt::entity invalidTerrain)
memberdef.name: convertTerrainTileToEmpty

briefdescription.para: Convert a repository-backed terrain tile into EMPTY and clear its storage state.

detaileddescription.para:
Acquires a TerrainGridLock for the duration of the operation to ensure atomic updates to TerrainGridRepository fields (id, type, matter container, SI).
registry
The entt::registry (kept for symmetry / future use).
voxelGrid
The VoxelGrid containing the repository to modify.
pos
The position of the tile to convert.
invalidTerrain
The entity handle that is being converted (may be invalid).

memberdef.argsstring: (int x, int y, int z, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid)
memberdef.name: setVaporSI

briefdescription.para: Modifies the StructuralIntegrityComponent of a tile in the VoxelGrid to have vapor properties.

parameterdescription.para: The VoxelGrid for accessing the terrain repository.

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, entt::entity entity, const Position &position, const Velocity &velocity, bool isTerrain)
memberdef.name: cleanupZeroVelocity

briefdescription.para: Cleans up entities with zero velocity.

detaileddescription.para:
For non-terrain entities, it removes the Velocity component. For terrain entities, it resets the velocity to zero directly in the TerrainGridRepository.
registry
The entt::registry.
voxelGrid
The VoxelGrid for accessing the terrain repository.
entity
The entity to check.
position
The position of the entity.
velocity
The velocity of the entity.
isTerrain
Flag indicating if the entity is a terrain entity.

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, int terrainId, int x, int y, int z)
memberdef.name: convertSoftEmptyIntoWater

briefdescription.para: Orchestrates the conversion of a terrain block to water.

detaileddescription.para:
It calls different underlying mutators based on whether the terrain data is stored in the ECS or directly in the VoxelGrid storage.
registry
The entt::registry.
voxelGrid
The VoxelGrid.
terrainId
The ID of the terrain entity/tile.
x
The x-coordinate of the tile.
y
The y-coordinate of the tile.
z
The z-coordinate of the tile.

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, int terrainId, int x, int y, int z)
memberdef.name: checkAndConvertSoftEmptyIntoWater

briefdescription.para: A wrapper that performs a read-only check before converting a tile to water.

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the terrain entity/tile.

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, int terrainId, int x, int y, int z)
memberdef.name: convertSoftEmptyIntoVapor

briefdescription.para: Converts a soft empty terrain tile into vapor. (Currently a placeholder).

parameterdescription.para: The ID of the terrain entity/tile.

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, int terrainId, int x, int y, int z)
memberdef.name: checkAndConvertSoftEmptyIntoVapor

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, entt::entity entity)
memberdef.name: dropEntityItems

briefdescription.para: Handles dropping items from a dying entity's inventory into the world.

detaileddescription.para:
(Placeholder) This function is intended to read an entity's DropRates component, create new item entities, and place them in the inventory of the tile below the dying entity. The logic is currently commented out in the original LifeEngine.
registry
The entt::registry.
voxelGrid
The VoxelGrid.
entity
The entity dropping items.

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, entt::dispatcher &dispatcher, entt::entity entity, bool takeLock=true)
memberdef.name: removeEntityFromGrid

briefdescription.para: Removes an entity from its position in the VoxelGrid.

detaileddescription.para:
It checks the entity's type to call the appropriate grid deletion method (e.g., deleteTerrain or deleteEntity). It includes safety checks to ensure the correct entity is being removed from the grid.
registry
The entt::registry.
voxelGrid
The VoxelGrid.
dispatcher
The entt::dispatcher, used for terrain deletion events.
entity
The entity to remove from the grid.

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registryRef, VoxelGrid &voxelGridRef, entt::dispatcher &dispatcherRef, entt::entity entity, bool removeFromGrid)
memberdef.name: removeEntityFromTerrain

briefdescription.para: Removes an entity from terrain storage (VoxelGrid / TerrainGridRepository)

detaileddescription.para: This is a free function variant of the previous World::removeEntityFromTerrain. The caller is responsible for holding any lifecycle locks (e.g., entityLifecycleMutex) if required by the caller's locking contract. This function will acquire a TerrainGridLock when modifying the repository if removeFromGrid is true.

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, entt::dispatcher &dispatcher, entt::entity entity, bool takeGridLock=true)
memberdef.name: destroyEntityWithGridCleanup

briefdescription.para: Destroys an entity and performs grid/repository cleanup.

detaileddescription.para:
registry
The entt::registry.
voxelGrid
The VoxelGrid for repository access.
dispatcher
The dispatcher used by removeEntityFromGrid if necessary.
entity
The entity to destroy.
takeGridLock
If true, callers will attempt to take repository locks when modifying the grid.
Locking contract: this function DOES NOT acquire World::entityLifecycleMutex. The caller must hold any lifecycle locks required to prevent races with perception/creation. This function will acquire a TerrainGridLock when performing grid modifications if takeGridLock is true.

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, entt::dispatcher &dispatcher, entt::entity entity)
memberdef.name: softKillEntity

briefdescription.para: Performs a "soft kill" on an entity, removing its life components and grid representation.

detaileddescription.para:
A soft kill removes essential life components like Health and Metabolism, effectively making the entity "dead" without immediately destroying the entity handle. It also removes the entity from the main VoxelGrid representation.
registry
The entt::registry.
voxelGrid
The VoxelGrid.
dispatcher
The entt::dispatcher, used for terrain deletion events.
entity
The entity to be soft-killed.

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, entt::dispatcher &dispatcher, Position &positionOfEntt, entt::entity &invalidTerrain)
memberdef.name: reviveColdTerrainEntities

briefdescription.para: A complex handler for "dormant" or invalid terrain entities that still have a Velocity component.

detaileddescription.para:
It attempts to reactivate a valid terrain entity from the TerrainGridRepository. If revival fails, it may destroy the entity or convert it to an EMPTY tile.
registry
The entt::registry.
voxelGrid
The VoxelGrid.
dispatcher
The entt::dispatcher.
positionOfEntt
The last known position of the entity.
invalidTerrain
The entity handle, which may be invalid.
A valid, revived entity handle.
aetherion::InvalidEntityException
if the entity cannot be revived.
std::runtime_error
for other fatal errors.

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, entt::dispatcher &dispatcher, entt::entity entity)
memberdef.name: handleInvalidEntityForMovement

briefdescription.para: Orchestrates the handling of an invalid entity detected during physics movement.

detaileddescription.para:
It attempts to revive the entity by calling reviveColdTerrainEntities. If that fails, or if the entity's position is not found, it destroys the entity.
registry
The entt::registry.
voxelGrid
The VoxelGrid.
dispatcher
The entt::dispatcher.
entity
The entity handle, which may be invalid.
A valid, potentially new, entity handle if revival was successful.
aetherion::InvalidEntityException
if the entity cannot be handled and must be skipped.

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, entt::dispatcher &dispatcher, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, int x, int y, int z, double fallingAmount, entt::entity sourceEntity, Position sourcePos)
memberdef.name: createWaterTerrainFromFall

briefdescription.para: Creates a new water entity from a "water fall" event.

detaileddescription.para:
This is a highly compound function that:
Creates a new entity in the ECS.
Emplaces all required components (Position, Velocity, MatterContainer, etc.).
Updates the VoxelGrid to reference the new entity.
Modifies the MatterContainer of the source entity that produced the water.
Potentially destroys the source entity if its matter is depleted.
This function performs its own manual grid locking.
registry
The entt::registry.
voxelGrid
The VoxelGrid.
x
The x-coordinate for the new water tile.
y
The y-coordinate for the new water tile.
z
The z-coordinate for the new water tile.
fallingAmount
The amount of water matter for the new tile.
sourceEntity
The entity from which the water is falling.

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, int x, int y, int z, int amount)
memberdef.name: addOrCreateVaporAbove

briefdescription.para: Adds vapor to an existing tile above a source or creates a new vapor entity if no tile exists.

parameterdescription.para: The x-coordinate of the source tile.
The y-coordinate of the source tile.
The z-coordinate of the source tile.
The amount of vapor to add.

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, entt::dispatcher &dispatcher, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, int vaporX, int vaporY, int vaporZ, double condensationAmount, MatterContainer &vaporMatter)
memberdef.name: createWaterTerrainBelowVapor

briefdescription.para: Creates a new water tile below a vapor tile during condensation.

detaileddescription.para: This is a compound function that creates a new water entity with all its components, updates the VoxelGrid, modifies the source vapor tile's MatterContainer, and may destroy the vapor entity if it's depleted.

simplesect.para: This function acquires a TerrainGridLock internally for atomic state changes. Caller MUST NOT hold the terrain grid lock before calling this function.
Enforces the invariant: vapor tile must have WaterMatter == 0 (cannot have both liquid and vapor).

parameterdescription.para: The x-coordinate of the source vapor tile.
The y-coordinate of the source vapor tile.
The z-coordinate of the source vapor tile.
The amount of water to create.
A reference to the MatterContainer of the source vapor tile.
if vapor tile already contains WaterMatter (state invariant violation).

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::dispatcher &dispatcher, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, const InvalidTerrainFoundEvent &event)
memberdef.name: _handleInvalidTerrainFound

memberdef.argsstring: (VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, const WaterSpreadEvent &event)
memberdef.name: _handleWaterSpreadEvent

memberdef.argsstring: (VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, const WaterGravityFlowEvent &event)
memberdef.name: _handleWaterGravityFlowEvent

memberdef.argsstring: (VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, const TerrainPhaseConversionEvent &event)
memberdef.name: _handleTerrainPhaseConversionEvent

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, int x, int y, int z, bool takeLock=true)
memberdef.name: createAndRegisterVaporEntity

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, entt::dispatcher &dispatcher, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, const CreateVaporEntityEvent &event)
memberdef.name: _handleCreateVaporEntityEvent

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, entt::dispatcher &dispatcher, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, const VaporMergeSidewaysEvent &event)
memberdef.name: _handleVaporMergeSidewaysEvent

memberdef.argsstring: (Position &position, const MovingComponent &movingComponent)
memberdef.name: updatePositionToDestination

memberdef.argsstring: (VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, entt::entity entity, const MovingComponent &movingComponent)
memberdef.name: applyTerrainMovement

memberdef.argsstring: (VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, entt::entity entity, const MovingComponent &movingComponent)
memberdef.name: applyEntityMovement

memberdef.argsstring: (entt::registry &registry, entt::dispatcher &dispatcher, VoxelGrid &voxelGrid, entt::entity entity, Position &position, Velocity &velocity, int movingToX, int movingToY, int movingToZ, float completionTime, bool willStopX, bool willStopY, bool willStopZ, bool isTerrain)
memberdef.name: createMovingComponent

briefdescription.para: Centralized access point for physics state mutators.

detaileddescription.para: This header centralizes and documents the set of functions that mutate physics-related state in the engine. Its primary purpose is to provide a single, well-documented surface for callers to locate and use mutators that affect either ECS component storage, terrain repository storage, or both.

The module also classifies each mutator by three concerns so callers can reason about safety and side-effects: where state is stored, what synchronization or atomicity guarantees (if any) exist, and the expected scope of side-effects. That classification reduces accidental misuse and centralizes locking guidance for terrain/ECS interactions.

Purpose
Centralize: Expose physics mutators from a single, discoverable header.
Classify: Make storage target, locking model, and scope explicit.
Guide: Help callers pick the correct mutator and adhere to locking contracts so repository and ECS state remain consistent.

Classification Dimensions:
Storage Target
ECS-only: Mutates only entt component storage (Position, Velocity, MatterContainer...). Example: updateEntityVelocity, convertIntoSoftEmpty, setEmptyWaterComponentsEnTT.
Repository-only: Mutates only TerrainGridRepository/VoxelGrid storage (tile id, matter container, SI). Example: setEmptyWaterComponentsStorage, setVaporSI.
Hybrid: Touches both ECS and repository to keep them consistent. Example: createVaporTerrainEntity, createWaterTerrainFromFall.
Synchronization & Atomicity
Lock-Free / Caller-Synchronized: No locks taken; caller must ensure safety. Example: updateEntityVelocity, setEmptyWaterComponentsEnTT.
Conditional Locking: Take a lock only when needed / via takeLock flag. Example: addOrCreateVaporAbove.
Internal Atomic (Self-locking): Acquire TerrainGridLock internally for atomic repo writes. Example: createWaterTerrainFromFall, convertTerrainTileToEmpty.
Scope & Side-Effects
Single-Entity-Local: Changes limited to one entity's components. Example: ensurePositionComponentForTerrain, convertIntoSoftEmpty.
Multi-Entity / Multi-Tile: Updates multiple entities/tiles or repository maps. Example: reviveColdTerrainEntities, addOrCreateVaporAbove.
Orchestration / Global Effects: Triggers events or lifecycle transitions. Example: destroyEntityWithGridCleanup, handleInvalidEntityForMovement.
Placement guidance: add a short tag comment on each function: [Storage:ECS|Repo|Hybrid] [Lock:None|Cond|Internal] [Scope:Entity|Multi|Orch]
